title: Kadhallikkum Aasai Illai Lyrics Chellamae
stanzas:
Kadhallikkum Aasai Illai Song Lyrics From Chellamae
#HarrishJayaraj #KayKay #Mahathi

Kadhallikkum aasai illai
kangal unnai kaanum varai
ullukkul kadhal
poothadhu unnaal

pattinathaar paadal mattum
paadam seidhu oppithaen
kannae naan unnai
kaanum munnaal

en aasai moongil
vedikka vaithaai
enn aanmai enakke
vilanga vaithaai

naa thottukolla
kitta vandhaal
thitti thitti
thiththithaai.

Kadhallikkum aasai illai
kangal unnai kaanum varai
ullukkul kadhal
poothadhu unnaal

pattinathaar paadal mattum
paadam seidhu oppithaen
kannae naan unnai
kaanum munnaal

sandhira sooriyar
ezhugayile unmuga
jaadaigal therigiradhe

boomiyil nilavu
varigayile azhagiya
koondhal sarigiradhe

sarigiradhe.....
virigiradhe.. hey hey hey..

vinnum mannum
unakkulla vilambaramo
ne vellichathil
seidhu vaitha
uli sirppamo..

manamadha motto
naan varudum kaattro
manamadha motto
naan varudum kaattro

Kadhallikkum aasai illai
kangal unnai kaanum varai
ullukkul kadhal
poothadhu unnaal

pattinathaar paadal mattum
paadam seidhu oppithaen
kannae naan unnai
kaanum munnaal

unmuga konda
paruvinilum
vinmeen oligal
veesudhadi

kobam vazhiyum
velaiyilum idhayam
kannil minnudhadi

minnudhadi..
enai kolludhadii..

engae nindru kaanum
podhum vaanam ondruthaan
unai endhap pakkam
paarkum podhum
penmai nandruthaan

uyir vidum munne
enai kadhali penne
uyir vidum munne
enai kadhali penne

kadhalikkum aasai illai
kadavul vandhu
sonnaalum
yemaandha pennai
thaedi poyaa

un sattaiyodu
otti kollum
pattai roja
naanallaa.

mullodu thaenumillai
poyaa.

oru kadhal enakul
pirakka villai
unai yaeno enakke
pudikka villai

nee kallai kanda
kaniyo indru
kadhal seivadhu
veenvelai.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kadhallikkum Aasai Illai?

The song explores the complexities and emotional depths of love, capturing both romantic and melancholic moods.

Who are the singers of this song?

KK and Mahathi lend their voices to this beautiful duet.

Who composed the music for Chellamae?

The music for the movie was composed by Harrish Jeyaraj.

What role does the song play in the movie?

The song reflects the emotional turmoil and longing experienced by the characters, adding depth to the film's narrative.

When was the movie Chellamae released?

The movie was released in the year 2004.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Chellamae, Kadhallikkum Aasai Illai is a poignant melody that delves into the emotional intricacies of love and longing. Sung by KK and Mahathi, the song beautifully captures the bittersweet essence of romance. Vairamuthu's evocative lyrics combined with Harrish Jeyaraj's soulful composition create a hauntingly beautiful experience. The song conveys a sense of yearning and emotional depth, making it a memorable piece in the film's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the soulful blend of Kadhallikkum Aasai Illai from the movie Chellamae, where KK and Mahathi's voices beautifully capture the essence of love's complexities. With Vairamuthu's poignant lyrics and Harrish Jeyaraj's mesmerizing music, this song is a timeless melody. Dive into the emotional depths of this unforgettable track that resonates with the heart.
stanzaMeanings: I don't want to love, but until my eyes see you, love has blossomed inside me because of you.
I learned and sang only the songs of Pattinathaar before I saw you, dear.
You made my desires explode like bamboo, and made me understand my masculinity.
When I tried to touch you, you moved away playfully.
I don't want to love, but until my eyes see you, love has blossomed inside me because of you.
I learned and sang only the songs of Pattinathaar before I saw you, dear.
In the rising of the moon and sun, your facial expressions are visible.
In the moonlit night on earth, your beautiful hair is flowing.
Flowing... breaking... hey hey hey..
Is there an announcement between the sky and earth for you? Or a sculpture carved in silver?
I am the breeze that carries the fragrance of love.
I don't want to love, but until my eyes see you, love has blossomed inside me because of you.
I learned and sang only the songs of Pattinathaar before I saw you, dear.
Even in your youthful face, the light of the stars shines.
Even in anger and work, the heart sparkles in your eyes.
Sparkles... it kills me...
Wherever you stand, the sky is one, and wherever you look, femininity is great.
Before life ends, love me, dear. Before life ends, love me, dear.
Even if God comes and says, I don't want to love, I won't go searching for a deceiving girl.
I am not the rose that sticks to your dress.
There is no honey with thorns, go away.
A love didn't arise in me, and I don't know why I don't like you.
Are you a fruit that sees a stone? Today, loving is a waste of time.
